host.description: Hostname or IP of the SSH jump/utility node to execute on.

private_key.description: PEM-encoded private key used for authentication. Stored as a secret.

host_pubkey.description: Server host public key line for known_hosts pinning, e.g. 'ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3Nz...'. When set, the wrapper enforces StrictHostKeyChecking=yes. Leave empty to fall back to weaker TOFU (accept-new).

description: Target host reachable over SSH for the lightweight SSH execution wrapper. See examples/usecase/ssh-execution-wrapper/README.md.
